programs.title: Bubble's Hotel
programs.sub_title: Luck Is In The Air/Too Chicken to Fly/Oodles of Noodles
programs.desc: When Bubble loses a guest's lucky pendant, she struggles to confess to her mistake.  / Bubble's guest, a kung fu master, asks Chef Pepper to teach her how to make her grandma's legendary noodle recipe.

programs.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programs.desc: The Bladers take a quick snack break. Jiji comes to the rescue with his signature scrumptious feast. Xander presents Bel with a challenge over who gets Jiji to stay with them.

programs.title: Beyblade X
programs.desc: Omega Shiroboshi has announced that a Star Battle is about to begin, and the Bladers of X City, both professional and amateur, are excited. Tenka asks Ekusu Kurosu for help in defeating Omega.  Bird seems dissatisfied with Ekusu's enthusiasm.  However, in order to have the chance to challenge Team Zodiac, Persona also decides to take part in the Star Battle.  Among the teams that Tenka choose as her first opponents was a familiar face.  On the other hand, something unusual happens to Ekusu. And so Team Persona's first battle begins!

programs.title: LEGO City Adventures
programs.sub_title: Doorman Of The City/Fendrich In The Wild

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Trey injures himself on the Roberts' property, so the family nurses their demanding neighbour until Barbie realizes Trey may be up to something.

programs.title: Theatre Dome
programs.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Glow sticks, frisbees, and worms - oh my! Who can turn this pile of junk into an invention worthy of the win?
